title: tabebuia stenocalyx
intro: Tabebuia stenocalyx, also known as the Pink Trumpet Tree, is a flowering plant species in the Bignoniaceae family. This plant is rich in medicinal properties, particularly containing beta-amyrin acetate, which has been shown to exhibit anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Tabebuia stenocalyx include its potential to treat various conditions, such as fever, rheumatism, and respiratory issues, due to its expectorant properties. Herbal preparations of Tabebuia stenocalyx are often made from its bark, leaves, and flowers, which can be used in teas, tinctures, or infusions to harness its medicinal benefits.
